auth.signUpSubtitle: Start tracking the moments that matter.
auth.name: Name
auth.signInError: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.
auth.signUpError: Could not create account. Try a different email.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We'll email you a link to reset it.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a link shortly.
auth.forgotPasswordError: Could not send the reset link. Try again.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a secure password with at least 8 characters.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.resetPasswordInvalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired.

landing.title: Remember what matters
landing.subtitle: Track important dates, people, and the context you need when the moment arrives — favorite places, gift ideas, and personal notes.

today.title: Today
today.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
today.inDays: In {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
today.noActivitiesForPerson: No activities for this person in the visible range.

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.subtitle: Calendar of events and holidays
upcoming.empty: No events or holidays to show yet.
upcoming.dayDetailCount: {count, plural, =0 {No activities} one {# activity} other {# activities}}

events.addEventDescription: Save a date or an idea for later.
events.title: Title
events.peopleHint: Optional — link this event to someone important.
events.noPeople: Add people first to link them to events.
events.editEventDescription: Update the date, linked people, or details.
events.recurringHint: Repeats every year on the same date (birthdays, anniversaries…).
events.reminderHint: You can pick multiple reminders. Send time is configured in Settings.

eventActivityHint.past: Link a preference or note from this person to what happened at the event.
eventActivityHint.today: Link a preference or note to what is happening today.
eventActivityHint.future: Link a preference or note as the plan for this event.
eventActivityHint.undated: Link a preference or note for this undated event.

events.eventActivityNeedPeople: Link at least one person to the event before logging activity.
events.eventActivityNoPreferences: This person has no saved preferences yet.
events.eventActivityNoPersonNotes: This person has no saved notes yet.
events.eventActivityAllLogged: You've already logged all their preferences for this event.
events.eventActivityAllNotesLogged: You've already linked all their notes for this event.
events.noEventActivity: No activity logged for this event yet.

people.title: People
people.subtitle: Family, partners, friends — with their preferences and notes.
people.empty: Add someone important to start building context for their special moments.
people.addPersonDescription: Save someone important and keep their preferences close.
people.name: Name
people.loadError: Could not load this person's data.
people.detailSubtitle: Preferences, notes, and context for special moments.
people.deleteConfirmDescription: All preferences, notes, and event links will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.preferencesHint: Country, language, timezone, and email reminder send time.
settings.themeError: Could not save theme preference. Please try again.
settings.timezoneHint: Suggested automatically from your country. You can change it if needed.
settings.reminderHourHint: Email reminders are sent at this hour in your timezone.
settings.exportDataHint: Download a copy of your people, events, preferences, and notes.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Permanently deletes your account, people, events, and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: All data for {email} will be permanently deleted, including people, events, and reminders.
settings.preferenceCategoriesHint: Built-in categories cover common cases. Add your own to organize each person's tastes.
settings.deleteCustomCategoryDescription: You can only delete categories that are not used in preferences or event activity logs.
settings.noPasswordAccount: Your account has no password (you signed in with Google).
settings.googleLinked: Google is linked to your account.
settings.linkGoogleHint: Link Google for faster sign-in. It must use the same email ({email}).
settings.cannotUnlinkOnlyProvider: You cannot unlink Google if it is your only sign-in method.

onboarding.title: Set up your account
onboarding.subtitle: We'll use this to show the right holidays and send reminders at the right time.
onboarding.timezoneHint: Suggested automatically from your country. You can change it if needed.
